title: AST Unlawful Contact: Fairbanks [AK25079956]
summary: On August 9, 2025, at approximately 1802 hours, Fairbanks AST received a report of a disturbance in the area of Despain Lane. Investigation revealed probable cause to arrest Jason Sherrer for Unlawful Contact in the first degree. Jason was remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center without incident.

title: AST SAR/Missing Person: Fairbanks [AK25079447]
summary: On Aug. 8, 2025, Alaska State Troopers received a report that 61-year-old Tony Peter had been missing since early Aug. 6. A search was conducted on Aug. 8 and Aug. 9, including by helicopter, drone and with dogs. On Aug. 9, Peter was located deceased. The preliminary investigation indicated that Peter’s death was self inflicted. His body was sent to the State Medical Examiner’s Office for autopsy and his next of kin were notified.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Education Support Override, Change of Command and a Busy Lingering Summer

title: AST MVC: Wasilla [AK25079726]
summary: On 8/8/2025 at approximately 2356 hours AST responded to the area of Bogard and Leatherleaf Loop in reference to a vehicle verse pedestrian collision. The investigation showed that a pedestrian walked into the roadway wearing dark clothing. A driver on Bogard was unbale to see the pedestrian in the roadway due to low light conditions and the pedestrian wearing dark clothing which caused the collision. The pedestrian was transported by EMS with severe injuries. AST would like to remind all pedestrians to walk on the provided pathways and stay out of the roadway.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: approximately 2356 hours AST responded to the area of Bogard and Leatherleaf Loop in reference to a vehicle verse pedestrian collision

title: AST Drugs: wasilla [AK25079599]
summary: On 08/08/2025 at approximately 18:36 hours, AST responded to a report of a disturbance in Wasilla. An investigation revealed that Anastasia Jovanov, age 35, of Wasilla, had user amounts of Methamphetamine and Fentanyl. Anastasia was arrested and remained at Mat-Su pretrial for MICS 5.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Q & A: Dara Rilatos brings The Planktonics to Wrangell this weekend
summary: The Planktonics will be performing at Wrangell’s Nolan Center on Aug. 9, 2025. Photo by Jessica Marie Whitney Singer-songwriter Dara Rilatos is the voice behind Juneau-based soul-funk band The Planktonics . But her musical roots go back to her childhood in Wrangell. She spoke with KSTK’s Colette Czarnecki to share her journey before returning home with her band for a special performance Aug. 9 at Wrangell’s Nolan Center. This pe...

title: Loomis accepts plea deal stemming from brush fire incident
summary: A Haines assembly member who faced misdemeanor charges following a heated exchange at a brush fire on his property, is now on probation. If he successfully completes probation, all charges will be cleared from his record. Craig Loomis was burning brush on his property on March 30. According to charg...
